title: Security & Observability Recap
concept: Reviewing sandboxing, action pre-flights, log tracing, and metric alerts in production.

exercises.prompt: What do Crew, Graph, and Custom state-machines help us with in AI agents?

options.text: They map to different AI agent problem sets.

exercises.explain: Crew, Graph, and Custom state-machines help us map the right tools and methodologies to different AI agent challenges.

cards.title: Security & Observability
cards.body: To keep AI agents safe and reliable, we need to understand security and observability tools.

cards.title: What is Sandboxing?
cards.body: Sandboxing creates a safe space to test AI agents by isolating them from the main system.

cards.title: Sandboxing as a Construction Site
cards.body: Think of sandboxing like a construction site that's blocked off so workers can build safely without affecting the city.

cards.title: Action Pre-Flights
cards.body: Before an AI agent takes an action, it checks if everything is okay, like a pilot checking a plane before takeoff.

cards.title: Myth: Security Means Extra Work
cards.body: Some believe that implementing security is complex and unnecessary, but it's essential to protect our systems.

cards.title: Monitoring Performance
cards.body: We can monitor AI agents using log tracing and metric alerts, ensuring they run smoothly.

left.text: Tracks specific actions taken by agents.

exercises.prompt: What is the purpose of log tracing?

options.text: To track actions by the agent.

exercises.explain: Log tracing helps us know what actions an AI agent has taken, just like a school has records of a student's activities.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Action pre-flights help verify if an AI agent can safely take action.
exercises.explain: Action pre-flights are like checks before an important event, ensuring that everything is ready to go.

exercises.prompt: Action pre-flights ensure AI agents can safely take ______.
exercises.sentence: Action pre-flights ensure AI agents can safely take actions in production.
exercises.explain: This checks if actions can happen safely, just like pre-flight checks ensure a plane is ready to fly.

exercises.prompt: Which tool would you use to alert on performance issues?
exercises.explain: Metric alerts notify us about issues with the AI agent's performance, like a smoke alarm warns of a fire.

exercises.prompt: What is the main benefit of using sandboxing and log tracing together?

options.text: They increase the performance of AI agents.
They ensure safe and monitored actions for AI agents.
They reduce costs of AI development.
They replace the need for action pre-flights.

exercises.explain: Using sandboxing and log tracing together allows us to create a safe testing environment while keeping track of actions and behaviors.
